headline: Eli Lilly Ramps Up AI Ambitions With This $2.8 Billion Deal. The Stock Rises.
summary: As the healthcare industry scrambles to integrate artificial intelligence,  Eli Lilly  is signaling it was already ahead of the curve.  InSilico, a self-professed “AI-driven biotech company,” unveiled a deal with the drugmaker Sunday that could be valued at up to $2.75 billion.  Under the terms of the arrangement, Lilly will receive exclusive worldwide rights to manufacture and sell oral treatments discovered using InSilico’s Pharma.AI model.
